name: RowCtProvRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD,SRC_SYS_CD,SUBJ_CD,MAX(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TrgtSys}' AND SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSys}' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SubjCd}' AND ROW_CT_BAL_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD,TRGT_SYS_CD,SUBJ_CD) UPDATE A SET A.ROW_CT_BAL_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC A JOIN cte B ON A.SRC_SYS_CD = B.SRC_SYS_CD AND A.SUBJ_CD = B.SUBJ_CD AND A.TRGT_SYS_CD = B.TRGT_SYS_CD AND A.RUN_CYC_NO <= B.RUN_CYC_NO AND A.ROW_CT_BAL_IN = 'N'

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


CALLED BY:     FctsProvBalCntl

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job Updates the P_RUN_CYC table with the ROW_CT_BAL_IN set to 'Y' after balancing is done for the subject area

MODIFICATIONS:
Developer                          Date                 Project/Altiris #                Change Description                             Development Project    Code Reviewer            Date Reviewed
----------------------------------      -------------------    -----------------------------------    ---------------------------------------------------------      ----------------------------------   ---------------------------------    -------------------------   
Parikshith Chada               06/21/2007          3264                              Originally Programmed                           devlIDS30                 Steph Goddard            09/19/2007            



Pooja Sunkara                 09-12-2014            5345                              Rewrite in Parallel                                   IntegrateWrhsDevl     Kalyan Neelam            2015-01-09

Annotations:
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  ROW_CT_BAL_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Set ROW_CT_BAL_IN to 'Y'
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been balanced with respect to IDS for each of the run cycles processed.
Job name:
RowCtProvRunCycUpd_EE
